summary: TWO_COLUMN Darboux integrability for f(x)=x² on [0, 1]. LEFT axes with RED f curve + BLUE upper-sum rectangles (height = f at right) and GREEN lower-sum rectangles (height = f at left) via always_redraw. ValueTracker n_tr steps through n=2, 4, 8, 16, 32. RIGHT has live U, L, U-L → 0, vs ∫=1/3.
